# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM role for Lambda functions with access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Description: Environment name for resource naming and tagging

  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Default: myproject
    Description: Project name for resource naming

  S3BucketArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket to grant access to
    AllowedPattern: arn:aws:s3:::.+

  DynamoDBTableArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB table to grant access to
    AllowedPattern: arn:aws:dynamodb:.+

  SQSQueueArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue to grant access to
    AllowedPattern: arn:aws:sqs:.+

  SNSTopicArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic to grant access to
    AllowedPattern: arn:aws:sns:.+

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-execution-role
      Description: !Sub IAM role for Lambda functions in ${Environment} environment
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  CloudWatchLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-cloudwatch-logs-policy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLogGroupCreation
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - logs:CreateLogGroup
            Resource: !Sub arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*
          - Sid: AllowLogStreamAndEvents
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - logs:CreateLogStream
              - logs:PutLogEvents
            Resource: !Sub arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*:*

  CloudWatchMetricsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-cloudwatch-metrics-policy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPutMetrics
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                cloudwatch:namespace: !Sub ${ProjectName}/${Environment}

  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-s3-access-policy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3BucketOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetObjectVersion
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource:
              - !Ref S3BucketArn
              - !Sub ${S3BucketArn}/*
          - Sid: DenyS3PolicyAndACLChanges
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - s3:PutBucketPolicy
              - s3:DeleteBucketPolicy
              - s3:PutBucketAcl
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:DeleteBucket
            Resource:
              - !Ref S3BucketArn
              - !Sub ${S3BucketArn}/*

  DynamoDBAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-dynamodb-access-policy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowDynamoDBDataOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - dynamodb:GetItem
              - dynamodb:PutItem
              - dynamodb:UpdateItem
              - dynamodb:DeleteItem
              - dynamodb:Query
              - dynamodb:Scan
              - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
              - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
              - dynamodb:ConditionCheckItem
            Resource:
              - !Ref DynamoDBTableArn
              - !Sub ${DynamoDBTableArn}/index/*
          - Sid: DenyDynamoDBTableManagement
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:CreateTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
              - dynamodb:CreateBackup
              - dynamodb:RestoreTableFromBackup
            Resource:
              - !Ref DynamoDBTableArn

  SQSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-sqs-access-policy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSQSMessageOperations
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !Ref SQSQueueArn
          - Sid: DenySQSQueueManagement
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - sqs:DeleteQueue
              - sqs:CreateQueue
              - sqs:SetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:AddPermission
              - sqs:RemovePermission
            Resource: !Ref SQSQueueArn

  SNSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-sns-access-policy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
              - sns:GetTopicAttributes
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopicArn
          - Sid: DenySNSTopicManagement
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - sns:DeleteTopic
              - sns:CreateTopic
              - sns:SetTopicAttributes
              - sns:AddPermission
              - sns:RemovePermission
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:Unsubscribe
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopicArn

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-role-arn

  LambdaExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-role-name
